name: Golf garage Please click on website to book Times NOT BOOK NOW !!! 3 bays open, Pool, Darts and BEER and WINE
address: 804 W New Haven Ave, Melbourne, FL 32901
about: Golf Garage is an indoor golf simulator facility in Melbourne, FL, equipped with Foresight technology that provides real-time feedback on ball speed, launch angle, spin rate, club path, and shot accuracy. The venue features three simulator bays and offers a range of experiences from practice sessions on virtual driving ranges to playing on over 500 golf courses. Pricing is structured through memberships or hourly rates, with members receiving discounted rates and priority event reservations. The facility is designed to cater to golfers of all skill levels in a casual, social atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Foresight simulator technology provides comprehensive, real-time swing data
Access to over 500 virtual golf courses, including iconic locations like Augusta
Loyalty program offering 5% cash back on simulator reservations
Social atmosphere with a full bar and pool for post-golf relaxation

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service; kitchen status not specified.
Full bar service with beer and wine available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Foresight Indoor Golf Simulators providing real-time ball and club tracking data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; the venue has its own full bar with beer and wine available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, typical 18-hole sessions on simulators usually take 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically advertise as kid-friendly; it appears to cater more to adults with a sports bar atmosphere.
